signInToParticipate: Sign in to join this competition.
noScoresYet: No pours submitted to this competition yet.

msgWelcomeJoin: You're in! Welcome to the competition.
ariaJoinedEnded: You participated in this competition; it has ended
ariaJoinedLive: You are a participant in this competition
bannerTitleEnded: You took part in this competition
bannerBodyEndedBefore: The competition window has closed. Pours had to be logged with
bannerBodyEndedAfter: while it was live; older scores couldn't be attached afterward. Thanks for playing.
bannerBodyLiveMiddle: while the window is live; older scores can't be attached afterward. We'll notify you when someone else submits.
signInToJoinPour: Sign in (Profile) to join or pour for this competition.
howPoursCountBody: Only new pours you log from the pour screen with this competition selected count; you can't attach older pours after joining.
scoresLimited: Showing the most recent {limit} competition pours for leaderboard performance.
emptyLeaderboardAfter: No pours were logged for this competition during the live window, so there is no leaderboard.
emptyLeaderboardWaitingBefore: Waiting for the first pour. Scores appear when someone uses
emailAfterPour: Email visible after they submit a pour here
participantsBlurbSignedIn: Everyone who joined. After someone pours in this comp, you can add them as a friend if their email appears on their pour.
participantsBlurbSignedOut: Sign in to see friend actions. Participant count is in the summary.
participantsEmpty: No participants yet. Be the first to join.
